item.title: Today Phillies had a kiss cam and Phillie Phanatic joined in
item.description: Some people are saying it is just an affair why so much coverage, two consenting adults. So here's my take. It is NOT about the affair. This guy is a CEO and his ex-employees have accused him of bullying AND the woman in picture is head of HR. HR is known to snitch on employees they frown upon inter-office relationship. These two together makes it funny, ironic with a taste of schadenfreude
item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: That'l learn 'em

item.title: Did someone say Bass?
item.description:
1. Prince - Party Man
2. Geezer Butler - N.I.B. by Black Sabbath
3. Bernard Edwards & Nile Rodgers - Le Freak by Chic
4. Les Claypool - Tommy the Cat by Primus
5. Tina Weymouth - Psycho Killer by Talking Heads
6. Freddie Washington - Forget Me Nots by Patrice Rushin
7. Bootsy Collins - Bootsy’s Basic Funk Formula
8. John Entwistle - Won’t Get Fooled Again by The Who
9. Jack Bruce - Tale of Brave Ulysses by Cream
10. Cliff Burton - For Whom the Bell Tolls by Metallica
11. Lemmy being Lemmy
12. John Paul Jones - Dazed and Confused by Led Zeppelin
13. Phil Lynott - The Boys Are Back In Town by Thin Lizzy
14. Larry Graham - Slap Bass Story
15. Flea - Bass solo
16. Geddy Lee - Bass solo
17. Gail Ann Dorsey - Under Pressure with David Bowie
18. Tal Wilkenfeld - Bass solo with Jeff Beck

item.title: My Sweet 16th Random Phone Clearing Dump
item.description:
It's just the beast in your bed.
Living in Texas, I've observed that the one way you know you've arrived in Corpus Christi is seagulls are the first thing you hear when you exit your vehicle.
There are about six of these fuckers back in my small piss ant town.
Mama mia.
Get the blood pumping.
If I had a hammer....
The struggle is real.
Through the ditches.
It's good to feel useful.
Mail Man!
Have a snack.
Bobbysaurus.
Arrrr!
Sus.
Hahaha. Disney is going to sue you now.
Let them free.
Get in touch with your inner Gwen/MJ/Liz/Felicia.
Make it so.
None of this regular ass knobbing.
Check your map again.
It grows on you.
It
Second place isn't so bad sometimes.
Drink up.
Try your hand at it.
Comb harder.
Oui, oui.
I'm gonna getcha, getcha, getcha....
You just have to wait a while.
Just having some phone sex.
The Rock says...
Have a whiff.
Don't judge.
We ain't found shit.
Video games worked period.
Indeed.
I'm sure I had this for my sister. It's one of her favorite movies.
Let the magic flow through you.
It could go either way.
We need something good in our lives.
Yeah.
It would explain a lot.
Ouch.
In American dollars.
Nothing to see here.
Technically, they are correct.
Whatever do you mean?
Sorry, Charlie.
Modern solutions.
Their catchphrase would be "We are inevitable!"
What's with that website?
Applause.
EDGERS ASSEMBLE!
You got what I neeeeeeeeed!
Please look at this fox. Carry on.
Goals.
Under meow-rrest.
I see you.
It goes right next to the dinglehopper.
OUR stall.
Ingrate.
It's tough love.
My sympathies.
Can't relate.
You do you.
That's not how Evanescence sang it.
But with your help, just a dollar a day, we can end it.
What's the starting bid?
You just know one will fall asleep in the middle of it.
Leveling up.
Can relate this time.
Know the difference.
High five?
I had other thoughts, but the sign says otherwise.
They were confusing time.
Special delivery.
Five dollar?
Fucking legend.
Spooky season.
Vermit.
Don't mess with the bouncer.
Lara Croft approves.
With family.
Some just handle it better.
You can't park there.
Waifus?
It's a horror game.
Quite easily.
These days, you're practically grilling that fucker.
Maybe next time.
I feel bad for laughing.
Nailed it.
Art Vandalay?
They're doing the thing!
Use in good health.
I'll take two potatoes.
Lzzy tax!
Lily tax!
item.dc:creator: HisBubbliness

item.dc:creator: absinthemindedprofessor

item.title: Bad week
item.description: What a week, but staying strong. Could use some power hugs tho. It was my birthday same-day that my brother's wife died, now it will always be the day that she died as well as my birthday. Maybe it's petty to think that way, but seems hard to loose that thought. Lots of negative thoughts, but staying sober is what keeps me going and gives me strength. Most viral edit. This community is awesome, has been big part of my everyday support system for years and in bad times you really show how beautiful community this really is. One love <3 Ps. If you want to help me further, I'm trying get deeper into classical music, piano and orchestral stuff, you can send me your recommendations.
item.dc:creator: joble

item.title: Hell yes, duckduckgo gives power to block AI images
item.description: https://www.knowyourmobile.com/data-privacy/duckduckgo-now-lets-you-hide-ai-generated-images-from-search-results/ DuckDuckGo Now Lets You Hide AI-Generated Images From Search Results Ever wished you could skip all the AI-generated “slop” cluttering up image search results? Google is all-in on AI and everything that comes with it, including AI generated everything. DuckDuckGo does things differently. It lets you turn off its AI overviews feature, for instance, unlike Google, and now DuckDuckGo has quietly rolled out a feature that lets you filter out AI generated images. Why DuckDuckGo’s New Filter Matters AI-generated images have exploded across the web thanks to services like Midjourney and DALL·E. Whether you’re searching for art, products, or memes, it’s getting harder to tell what’s human-made versus AI-generated. DuckDuckGo’s new setting—called Hide AI-Generated Images—gives you a simple way to filter these out of your search results. You won’t find this in most other search engines right now, including Google and Bing. How To Enable DuckDuckGo’s AI Image Filter There are two main ways to access this feature: 1. From DuckDuckGo’s Main Settings: Go to: duckduckgo.com/settings#aifeatures Look for Hide AI-Generated Images Toggle it on While you’re there, you can also disable Duck.ai and AI summaries if you prefer a more stripped-back search experience. 2. Using The NoAI Subdomain Visit: noai.duckduckgo.com This version of DuckDuckGo has AI image filtering and AI-assisted summaries automatically disabled. No need to tweak settings manually. Pro Tip: If you’re using privacy-focused browsers like Brave or Firefox, you can combine DuckDuckGo’s setting with custom blocklists such as uBlock Origin’s Huge AI Blocklist on GitHub for even stronger filtering. Does It Actually Work? Short answer: Mostly, yes. The filter isn’t perfect. Some AI-generated content might still slip through, but it significantly reduces clutter. For now, it’s not yet available directly inside the DuckDuckGo browser app, though we’d expect that to change with a future update. If you want more control, browser extensions like uBlock Origin and uBlacklist let you manually block AI image sites using community-maintained lists. Why This Is A Smart Move By DuckDuckGo As more people look for cleaner, more private web experiences, features like this set DuckDuckGo apart from mainstream search engines. It echoes why many users—including us—prefer DuckDuckGo, Brave, or even Bing over Google these days: Less clutter More control Stronger focus on privacy FAQ: DuckDuckGo AI Image Filter Does this work in the DuckDuckGo browser app? Not yet. The feature is only on the web version as of now. Can I block AI images completely? Not fully, but combining DuckDuckGo’s filter with browser extensions like uBlock Origin helps. Is this feature available on mobile? Yes—if you access DuckDuckGo via your mobile browser and adjust the settings. Why block AI-generated images at all? Most people prefer seeing real photography or human-created content rather than algorithm-generated visuals.
item.dc:creator: llebkcir

item.title: That's true.
item.description:
Here are all of the Epstein Files that have either been leaked or released. https://joshwho.net/EpsteinList/gov.uscourts.nysd.447706.1320.0-combined.pdf (verified court documents) https://joshwho.net/EpsteinList/black-book-unredacted.pdf (verified pre-Bondi) Trump is on page 85, or pdf pg. 80 Trump’s name is circled. The circled individuals are the ones involved in the trafficking ring according to the person who originally released the book. These people would be “The List “ Here is the story. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hsiKUXrlcac Here's the flight logs https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/21165424-epstein-flight-logs-released-in-usa-vs-maxwell/ —————————other Epstein Information https://cdn.factcheck.org/UploadedFiles/Johnson_TrumpEpstein_Calif_Lawsuit.pdf here’s a court doc of Epstein and Trump raping a 13 yr old together. Some people think this claim is a hoax. Here is Katies testimony on youtube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gnib-OORRRo Jeffrey Epstein’s Ex Says He Boasted About Being a Mossad Agent https://share.google/jLMGahKlCzfV1RHZq Jeffrey Epstein and Israel have both have the same lawyer Alan Dershowitz, Dershowitz says he's building 'legal dream team' to defend Israel in court and on international stage | The Times of Israel https://share.google/Lb9hDOduBWG4Elpid —————————other Trump information: Here's trump admitting to peeping on 14-15 year old girls at around 1:40 on the Howard Stern Radio Show: https://youtu.be/iFaQL_kv_QY?si=vBs75kaxPjJJThka Trump's promise to his daughter: https://www.huffpost.com/entry/donald-trump-ivanka-trump-dating-promise_n_57ee98cbe4b024a52d2ead02 “I have a deal with her. She’s 17 and doing great ― Ivanka. She made me promise, swear to her that I would never date a girl younger than her,” Trump said. “So as she grows older, the field is getting very limited.” Trump's modeling agency was probably part of Jeffreys pipeline: https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2016/08/donald-trump-model-management-illegal-immigration/ A good summary of Trump-Epstein timeline: https://thepresidential.medium.com/we-have-been-gaslit-about-donald-trump-and-jeffrey-epstein-for-four-years-fbda67c20f75 Feel free to do your part and spread this info around so it is never “lost”.
Bibi and Agent Orange have a lot in common, eh?
"I need a bigly distraction from all of this. Maybe more wars?" - Krasnov, also known as Agent Orange.
"US and Europe must prepare for war with China and Russia," NATO commander says: https://newsukraine.rbc.ua/news/us-and-europe-must-prepare-for-war-with-china-1752858365.html https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Foundations_of_Geopolitics#In_the_Americas Quote: In the Americas, United States, and Canada: * Russia should use its special services within the borders of the United States and Canada to fuel instability and separatism against neoliberal globalist Western hegemony, such as, for instance, provoke "Afro-American racists" to create severe backlash against the rotten political state of affairs in the current present-day system of the United States and Canada. Russia should "introduce geopolitical disorder into internal American activity, encouraging all kinds of separatism and ethnic, social, and racial conflicts, actively supporting all dissident movements – extremist, racist, and sectarian groups, thus destabilizing internal political processes in the U.S. It would also make sense simultaneously to support isolationist tendencies in American politics".[9] * The Eurasian Project[clarification needed] could be expanded to Central and South America.[9] /end quote

item.title: Welcome to Kopi Kamu
item.description: A cup of change: Kopi Kamu's commitment to inclusion goes beyond branding | Marketing-Interactive https://share.google/r3zY0maoC4SCYMZ8a In the bustling district of Kebayoran Baru, South Jakarta, a coffee shop named Kopi Kamu is redefining the essence of inclusivity in the business landscape. Launched in 2010, Kopi Kamu has recently garnered attention not merely for its aromatic brews but for its initiative to employ individuals with Down syndrome, moving beyond conventional marketing strategies to foster genuine societal impact.
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: Buon Pomeriggio!
item.description:
Sock for scale. Also, did you know that if you can spell socks, you can say a phrase in Spanish?
He's very dapper sometimes. I feel like he needs a bow tie.
Play time is usually amusing
Sometimes he has to be coerced into it.
Sometimes he's a chaotic muffin and Chessie has no idea what he's doing.
Bonus Frank purring video. Just because. Buona Giornata, Imgur. It's Friday. What should we have for dinner? The cats are covered, they're having kibble. Me? No idea. Someone tell me what to eat. I'm done making decisions for the day.
